threat: Exploit for Path Traversal in Tp-Link Tapo_C260_Firmware
content: index=* (query IN ("lfd.py","requirements.txt","tapo-c260-rce.git")) | stats count by src_ip, dest_ip | sort -count

threat: SentinelOne Intelligence Brief: Iranian Cyber Activity Outlo
content: index=* (query IN ("www.sentinelone.com")) | stats count by src_ip, dest_ip | sort -count

threat: Proactive Preparation and Hardening Against Destructive Atta
content: index=* (dest_ip IN ("1.3.6.1","2.5.29.37","5.2.3.4","5.5.7.3") OR query IN ("details.aspx","gpo-listing-all.csv","hostd.log","pfirewall.log","shell.log","snapshot.removeall","vim.event","vpxa.log","vpxd.log","vshphere.local")) | stats count by src_ip, dest_ip | sort -count
index=* (query IN ("os.path.commonprefix")) | stats count by src_ip, dest_ip | sort -count

threat: Official Launch: CYBERDUDEBIVASH® CyberTwin v1.0 Building a
content: index=* (query IN ("cyberdudebivash.gumroad.com")) | stats count by src_ip, dest_ip | sort -count
